params.name: Prince's Rose
params.source: Fragment Crafting (3.7%), Lottery Machine (0.8%), Wishing (0.34%), Fungus Chest (1.5%), Expert Scrolls (0.95%)
params.description:
On Mar 8, 1972, the little prince left his beloved rose.

After spending too much time together, the little prince got tired of the rose. The wind took it here. Then it grew and bloomed on the little prince's planet. The little prince put in the hard work to grow this rose. Before he left, the rose said that he loved roses not because he liked them but because of the effort he had put in.
